subcodes.first_line: O Pen of Holiness! Move in the Name of Him Who hath hearkened unto the Call of God from the Realm of immortality, from the presence of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم القدس تحرک علی اسم الذی سمع ندآء الله عن جبروت البقا من لدی الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God as sun
